text: Naye sasural mein abhi adjustment ho hi raha tha ki pati ne announce kiya ki unke maa-baap permanently shift ho rahe hain kyunki meri 35+ age dekh kar unhe waaris ki jaldi hai. Mera mann unhe mana karne ka tha par divorcee hone ke darr se maine muh nahi khola taaki maike ki 'izzat' mitti mein na mil jaye. Chup-chap unka swagat kiya taaki ghar mein kalesh na ho aur bade-buzurgo ka samman bana rahe.

In-laws ne decide kiya hai ki wo yahi rahenge taaki mujh par child pressure bana sakein, kyunki samaj mein sab keh rahe hain ki main ek 'expired' single mother hoon. Main unse bahas nahi kar sakti kyunki unhone mujh jaisi talaqshuda aurat ko apnaya hai, isliye maine apne saare darr aur sawaal daba liye hain. Unhe naraz karke main apna thoda bahut bacha hua thikana khona afford nahi kar sakti, isliye bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon.

Pati ne bina mujhse pooche in-laws ka permanent shift fix kar diya kyunki unhe lagta hai ki meri badhti umar mein guidance ki zaroorat hai. Mujhe meri economic precarity aur bacchon ke future ki chinta hai, par main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti kyunki beti aur bahu ka farz hamesha sehne ka hota hai. Maine apne saare suppressed ambitions kurban kar diye taaki sasural mein tamasha na bane aur parivaar ki maryada bani rahe.

Aaj in-laws ke permanent aane ke faisle ne meri lost identity ko aur gehra kar diya, par main bade-buzurgo ke aage nahi bol sakti kyunki 'log kya kahenge' ki dusri shaadi mein bhi nakhre hain. Mummy-Papa ne bhi phone par kaha ki chup-chap seva karo taaki rishta bana rahe aur khandaan ka naam kharab na ho. Maine apne aansuon ko nigal liya hai taaki kisi ko meri takleef ka pata na chale aur sab khush rahen.

Sasu-ma ne aate hi keh diya ki meri age 40 touch kar rahi hai aur ab mujhe sirf bhagwan aur parivaar ki seva karni chahiye, aur main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti. Unhe lagta hai ki main 'expired' bahu hoon, par main community exclusion ke darr se unki har zidd maan rahi hoon. Apne darr aur feelings ko kurban karke main bas ek aadarsh bahu banne ka farz nibha rahi hoon taaki pati ka samman bana rahe.
